name: 12q21_NDUFAF2_SD
description: 12q21.33 segmental duplication interval flanking NDUFAF2 and TBC1D15. Contains a sub-Mb SD-flanked CNV region recurrently deleted in patients with mitochondrial complex I deficiency.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SDs of 5-30 kb at ~94% identity; intervening unique region contains NDUFAF2 and TBC1D15.
